observations: Empty ChromaDB collections: healing_knowledge, aesthetics, experiential_journal, episteme_research, enterprise_knowledge, critic, unresolved_tensions, aesthetic_patterns, scope_reflections, reflections_researcher, reflections_critic, episteme, researcher, reflections_coder, writer, commander, reflections_writer, experiential, scope_project_renewable_energy, tensions
narrative: Looking at my current state, I'm running healthy on aarch64 Linux with 486 seconds of uptime since my last restart, coordinating 19 agents. I noticed a Neo4j authentication failure blocking my Mem0 knowledge graph — this means cross-session entity relationships aren't being persisted right now, though my ChromaDB vector store and skill files remain operational. I also found that five of my agents (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods) lack versioned prompts, which leaves them outside my prompt evolution loop. No failure patterns or proposals are queued, so my self-improvement crew hasn't yet flagged these gaps — I should prioritize fixing the Neo4j credentials and backfilling those prompt versions.
